{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Varic's wizard’s mantle
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Varic]] wears a wizard's mantle with silver symbols on the edges.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c6">''The Knight'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
